title: Intersex
overview: A multi-layered story following two intersex South Africans—a beauty queen and an activist—facing identity crises and trauma as they navigate a rigidly binary world, alongside a lifelong romance between two older women who, separated by the constraints of their time, now embrace the life they have left.
